summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.view.editors; import org.eclipse.swt.SWT; import org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Text; import org.eclipse.ui.PartInitException; public class EditorPageFactory { public static Text createEditorPage(MultiPageEditor editor, String content) throws PartInitException { Text text = new Text(editor.getContainer(), SWT.MULTI | SWT.V_SCROLL | SWT.H_SCROLL); text.setText(content); int index = editor.addPage(text); editor.setPageText(index, "Editor"); return text; } }
